reviews.comment:
Está a pocos kms de Rafaela, sobre la ruta 34. Las empleadas del Drugstore son muy amables. La última vez ,hace 2 meses, estaban remodelando x por ende no pudimos cargar nafta.

(Translated by Google)
It's a few kilometers from Rafaela, on Route 34. The employees at the Drugstore are very friendly. The last time we were there, two months ago, they were remodeling, so we couldn't get gas.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15910782450970095927/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNaV8zQVhREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para parar a recargar y por su gran parque tambien un lugar de esparcimiento y descanzo especial para viajeros de larga distancia que necesiten un comodo espacio para despejar la tension del manejo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop and recharge, and thanks to its large park, also a special place for recreation and rest for long-distance travelers who need a comfortable space to relieve the stress of driving.
